units.description: Exponential growth/decay; logarithm laws; natural log and applications

units.description: Counting principles; conditional probability; binomial distribution

units.description: Circle theorems; tangent-chord angles; formal two-column proofs

units.title: Energy: Work, Power, and Efficiency
units.description: Work-energy theorem; power and efficiency; gravitational potential energy

units.title: Waves and Optics
units.description: Reflection, refraction, lenses, and mirrors; wave-particle duality intro

units.title: Thermodynamics
units.description: Heat transfer; specific heat capacity; laws of thermodynamics

units.title: Organic Chemistry
units.description: Hydrocarbons; functional groups; naming organic compounds; reactions

units.title: Genetics and Biotechnology
units.description: DNA replication, transcription, translation; genetic engineering and CRISPR

units.title: Data Science with Python
units.description: Pandas, NumPy, and data cleaning; exploratory data analysis and visualization

units.title: Web Development
units.description: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript basics; building and deploying a static website

units.title: Computer Architecture

units.title: Software Development Lifecycle
units.description: Agile, version control (Git), testing, documentation, and deployment

units.title: Neural Networks Fundamentals
units.description: Perceptrons, activation functions, backpropagation, and image classification

units.title: Statics and Structural Analysis

units.title: Electrical Engineering Fundamentals

units.description: Machining, casting, forming, and joining; tolerances and quality control

units.description: Professional responsibility, safety, environmental impact, and case studies
